data.content:
Run this:

```
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` flag with the `TestCategory` property, which matches the `[TestCategory("Integration")]` attribute on your MSTest tests. It will run the 3 integration tests: `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`, `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`, and `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`.
data.reasoningText: The user wants to filter by the "Integration" category using dotnet test. This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory("Integration")]`. With VSTest (which this project uses), the filter syntax is `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.
